title: Paul Anthony Salon Pro Nose & Beard Trimmer - High Carbon Steel Blades - Nasal Clipper & Trimmer Heads - LED Light Illumination - Battery Operated - Includes Stand - Silver - H5130BK
features: HIGH CARBON STAINLESS STEEL BLADES: The blades oscillate rapidly for a smoother shave, whilst continuing to sharpen as they go.
2-IN-1 FACIAL TRIMMING KIT: This product is a great travel companion, have everything you need in one, small and compact set.
NOSE & EAR CLIPPER: Nasal and ear trimming head for those hard to reach areas.
PRECISION TRIMMER ATTATCHMENT Facial hair trimming head for moustache and sideburns.
BATTERY OPERATED: No need for a plug socket, simply place 1 x AA battery (not included) in to the unit and you're good to go!
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony Salon Pro Nose & Beard Trimmer is the ideal travel companion. It's compact design and multi use makes it great for on the move or at home. It is powered by 1 x AA battery (not included), meaning you don't need to be in reach of a plug socket or wait for it to recharge, just pop the battery in and you're ready to go! This is a 2-in-1 facial trimming kit, it has one nose and ear clipper attachment, for those hard to reach areas, and a precision trimmer attachment for facial hair, moustache and sideburns. Both of these heads have high carbon stainless steel blades, which continue to sharpen as they go. When you are finished using the trimmer, you can pop it in to the stand provided so keep it up right and store all the pieces together. Box Includes: 1 Paul Anthony Salon Pro Nose & Beard Trimmer Nose & Ear Clipper Attachment Precision Trimmer Attachment Stand Instruction Manual Cleaning Brush Safety Warning Caution: Do not use on children. Keep the clipper away from water. Do not use on sensitive skin areas. Unplug the clipper before cleaning. Do not use in case of skin irritation or skin injuries. Refer to the user manual for more information on proper use and maintenance.
